pr-dashboard.template: Run the PR dashboard script: `bun run ~/.config/opencode/scripts/pr-dashboard.ts`. Report what PRs were found, what was written to the daily note, and any agent sessions spawned. If the user passes arguments, append them to the command (e.g. `--no-agents` or `--dry-run`).
pr-dashboard.description: Fetch PRs to review and PRs needing changes, update daily note

yesmand-once.template: Run one yesmand issue cycle: `bun run ~/dotfiles/yesmand/src/index.ts --once --config ~/dotfiles/yesmand/config.json`. Report what candidates were found, what was dispatched, and any OpenCode session IDs created. If the user passes arguments, append them to this command (e.g. `--dry-run` or `--debug`).
